category_sources: source_facts.description says Visual Binary Diff; official VBinDiff page says it displays files in hexadecimal and ASCII/EBCDIC and highlights differences.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description expands to Visual Binary Diff; official homepage and GitHub README use VBinDiff.
docs_sources: Official cjmweb.net VBinDiff page links Unix documentation and Windows documentation pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official cjmweb.net VBinDiff page says development uses Git and links VBinDiff on GitHub.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe visual binary diffing, hexadecimal display, ASCII/EBCDIC display, and large-file comparison; GitHub reports C++ as primary language.
